languages.text: "Я не хочу спешить. Создадим запретную зону вокруг логова ксеносов".
"I do not wish to be hasty. We shall create an exclusion zone around the xenos' lair."
languages.original_text: "Я не хочу спешить. Создадим запретную зону вокруг логова ксеносов".

traits.locale_text: "I do not wish to be hasty. We shall create an exclusion zone around the xenos' lair."
"I do not wish to be hasty. We shall create an exclusion zone around the xenos' lair."
"I do not wish to be hasty. We shall create an exclusion zone around the xenos' lair."

languages.text: 「急ぐ必要はない。異星人の巣穴を囲んで排除区域を作れ」
languages.original_text: "I do not wish to be hasty. We shall create an exclusion zone around the xenos' lair."

traits.locale_text: 「急ぐことは好ましくありません。異星人の巣穴を取り囲む排除区域を設けましょう。」

languages.text: «No quiero precipitarme. Crearemos una zona de exclusión en torno a la guarida de los xenos».
languages.original_text: "I do not wish to be hasty. We shall create an exclusion zone around the xenos' lair."

traits.locale_text: «No quiero precipitarme. Crearemos una zona de exclusión en torno a la guarida de los xenos».

languages.text: “我不想操之过急。先在异形巢穴周边建立隔离区。”
languages.original_text: "I do not wish to be hasty. We shall create an exclusion zone around the xenos' lair."

traits.locale_text: “我不想操之过急。先在异形巢穴周边建立隔离区。”

languages.text: "Ich will nichts überstürzen. Wir werden eine Sperrzone um das Versteck der Xenos einrichten."
languages.original_text: "I do not wish to be hasty. We shall create an exclusion zone around the xenos' lair."

traits.locale_text: "Ich will nichts überstürzen. Wir werden eine Sperrzone um das Versteck der Xenos einrichten."

languages.text: "Aceleci davranmak istemiyorum. Zenoların ininin etrafında bir yasak bölge oluşturacağız."
languages.original_text: "I do not wish to be hasty. We shall create an exclusion zone around the xenos' lair."

traits.locale_text: "Aceleci davranmak istemiyorum. Zenoların ininin etrafında bir yasak bölge oluşturacağız."

languages.text: « Je ne veux pas me précipiter. Nous établirons une zone d'exclusion autour du repaire xénos. »
languages.original_text: "I do not wish to be hasty. We shall create an exclusion zone around the xenos' lair."

traits.locale_text: « Je ne veux pas me précipiter. Nous établirons une zone d'exclusion autour du repaire xénos. »
